entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: The continent where the agricultural study and policy recommendations are focused

entities.name: AGRICULTURE
entities.description: The practice of farming and crop production aimed at food security and poverty reduction

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: POVERTY
entities.description: The state of being extremely poor, which agriculture is expected to help people escape

entities.name: SMALLHOLDER FARMING
entities.description: Agricultural production dominated by small-scale landholdings

entities.name: CROP YIELD
entities.description: The amount of crop produced per unit area of land, with a gap existing between actual and potential levels

entities.name: RAINFED CONDITIONS
entities.description: Agricultural environments where water is supplied solely by rainfall

entities.name: POVERTY LINE
entities.description: The minimum level of income, defined by the World Bank as US$1.90 per day, deemed sufficient for basic necessities

entities.name: FARMER TYPOLOGIES
entities.description: A method of classifying farmers into groups to explain differences in investment incentives and capabilities

entities.name: INVESTMENT INCENTIVES
entities.description: The motivations and drivers for farmers to invest in their agricultural production

entities.name: FIELD-LEVEL TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: Technical interventions applied directly in the field to increase farm productivity

entities.name: FARM PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The efficiency and output level of a farm

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The process of improving agricultural practices and policies to achieve economic and social goals

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having access to food that provides all necessary nutrients for a healthy life

entities.name: ECONOMIC GROWTH
entities.description: An increase in the capacity of an economy to produce goods and services, contributed to by agricultural income
